forbidden_scope: API query, smoke, App integration, CLI/MCP/SDK-facing query API
Harbor SDK/runtime calls, browser launches, live sessions, evidence retrieval, or Harbor package imports
Harbor, Lode, App, or other repository changes
Lode package body copying, registry store ownership, validator execution, normalizer execution, or post-check execution
Action execution loop, retry/recovery orchestration, cancel endpoint, or true execution worker
Database, ORM, migration tooling, multi-backend abstraction, result store, or hosted service storage

integration_evidence.summary: Adds dependency-free helpers that advance existing Run Records to terminal success or structured failure and return public Result Envelopes.
Requires `ok`, aligns failure category/phase with Run Record taxonomy, and adds a failure Result Envelope fixture.
Validates success envelope, failure envelope, Run Record terminal fields, and private/raw result data rejection.
Validates schema fixtures and Run Record store conformance through the success/failure envelope helpers plus admission failure coverage.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Narrow Core runtime PR that adds terminal result/failure output helpers, schema/fixture alignment, and self-check/conformance coverage without query routes, generated clients, live Harbor/Lode calls, storage backends, or cross-repo edits.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume ADR 0003/0005/0007/0008, the Core helper, Result Envelope schema/fixtures, self-check/conformance output, GH-105 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint/conformance output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when API query routes, App/API smoke, evidence retrieval, generated types, CLI/MCP/SDK/App integration, database storage, hosted service storage, true execution, or true-write guardrails are added.

commands.note: Validated terminal success envelope, failure envelope, Run Record terminal fields, private/raw result data rejection, and read-only task submission admission.
Validated schema fixtures with success/failure Result Envelopes and 3 Run Records.

commands.command: test ! -d tools && for p in tools/skills_surface.py tools/loom_check.py tools/check_release_surface.py tools/version_surface_check.py tools/check_npm_package.py; do test ! -e "$p"; done
commands.note: Review-readiness source-distribution tools are not applicable to this consumer repo because there is no tools directory.

remaining_risks: GH-105 intentionally does not add query APIs or result storage; GH-96 owns API/query/smoke.
